programmes.show_description: Jenny is unhappy when her mum Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband, Brett. When Laura ends up in a coma, Jenny's suspicions of Brett deepen. Starring Jillian Murray. (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Thriller with Mia Topalian. Unable to find a management job, Jamie becomes a nanny for a charismatic tycoon. But rejecting his advances will put her - like those before her - in mortal danger. (2020)
Bombs Away: Sue returns from agent training to investigate a bomb threat at an oil refinery. Will Sue and Jack be able to prove the legitimacy of the threat in time?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Left-Handed Murder: Dr Sloan investigates the death of his friend whose arm is found in the stomach of a shark. Developments in the case leaves three women feeling shocked and bewildered.
...Deceit: Thriller with Jesse Metcalfe. A missing family heirloom is the key to finding the truth as former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr Zee Madieras to track down a murderer. (2020)
A Murderous Muse: Can Jessica prove whether the estranged father of a music prodigy is innocent of murdering his daughter's controlling mentor?
Wheel Of Death: The carnival comes to Cabot Cove, accompanied by a major crime spree within the town. Meanwhile, Sheriff Metzger has an awkward encounter with his college sweetheart.
A Nest Of Vipers: Jessica researches her latest book at a Californian zoo. Can she determine whether a deadly snake bite was an unfortunate incident or a meticulously planned murder?
Amsterdam Kill: Jessica investigates the disappearance of her friend during a trip to Amsterdam. Can she find her friend and a murderer?
To Kill A Legend: Will a letter, allegedly written by George Washington, damage the reputation of a Cabot Cove icon and lead to the murder of a documentary filmmaker?
Death In Hawaii: Jessica travels to Hawaii for a relaxing break but is soon drawn into an investigation surrounding the disappearance of her friend's son.
Dear Deadly: Can Jessica help to protect a San Francisco newspaper columnist after an attempt is made on her life?
Murder Channel: Are Jessica's neighbours watching a new television show, or are they unknowingly viewing a real-life murder taking place?
Fatal Paradise: Jessica travels to the idyllic Caribbean island of Martinique for a holiday. Can she help Chicago P.I, Charlie Garret, prove his innocence when he is accused of murder?
Crimson Harvest: Jessica visits Wine Country to attend the funeral of her friend's son, the heir to a struggling vineyard. Can she determine whether the murders of two men are linked?
...Last Scene Alive: Crime buff Aurora discovers she's the inspiration for a new film. But the plot thickens when the actress playing her is killed... (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Last Scene Alive: Crime buff Aurora discovers she's the inspiration for a new film. But the plot thickens when the actress playing her is killed... (2018)
...Impossible Dream: Heartwarming mystery starring Eric Mabius. The Postables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier in Afghanistan and reunite her with her family. (2015)

...Impossible Dream: Heartwarming mystery starring Eric Mabius. The Postables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier in Afghanistan and reunite her with her family. (2015)
Crime thriller with Fiona Gubelmann. A 911 operator takes a call from a child and dismisses it as a prank. But when a body is discovered, she'll do whatever it takes to make things right (2016).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime thriller starring Majandra Delfino. A computer security specialist is framed for bank fraud and must join forces with the FBI in a tense race to uncover the truth and clear her name (2009).
Assassins: Sue and her colleagues are assigned to stop a team of mercenaries hired to assassinate a visiting official dignitary.

...Bone To Pick: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. When her friend dies, super sleuth Aurora inherits a house, a hidden skull and a spine-tingling mystery to solve... (2015)

...Bone To Pick: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. When her friend dies, super sleuth Aurora inherits a house, a hidden skull and a spine-tingling mystery to solve... (2015)
With Honor: A murder investigation unearths evidence that suggests Al's former partner may have been a dirty cop. Can Carrie help to protect Al who now finds himself in danger?
Castle, P.I.: Barred from working with Beckett, Castle turns private eye to work 'independently' on the same case as the 12th precinct.
Crime mystery with Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith. Not much goes on in town without advice columnist Nelly knowing about it. But when her friend is suspected of murder, can she find a killer? (2024)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime mystery with Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith. Not much goes on in town without advice columnist Nelly knowing about it. But when her friend is suspected of murder, can she find a killer? (2024)
Murder by the Busload: A busload of potential suspects is revealed after a seemingly tragic road traffic accident becomes a suspected crime scene. Can Dr Sloan and Steve unearth a murderer?
A Candidate for Murder: Dr Sloan investigates the death of a senator's daughter who seemingly died from a drugs overdose. Can he and Amanda discover the truth?
Murder By Twos: Jessica investigates the suspicious deaths of two Cabot Cove locals. Are the deaths linked to an arson attack and a spate of burglaries?
Murder Of The Month Club: Jessica investigates the death of an audience member during the recording of an infomercial.
A Blast From The Past: Can the team protect an agent and his family from an ex-con determined to avenge his imprisonment? Meanwhile, Lucy is on a collision course with a doctor.
Private Eye Caramba!: Beckett investigates the murder of a young Soap Opera star. Meanwhile, PI Castle is also hired to investigate by one of the show's sultry stars.
Friended: Carrie and Al investigate the murder of a party loving heiress. But their investigation is complicated further by a web of lies.
Pilot: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses. Stars Mary McCormack.
...Death: Murder mystery with Alison Sweeney. A true-crime podcaster investigates a death at a self-help retreat. Can she piece together the clues, or will the killer mute her investigation? (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
